cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently cite competitive salary, 401k, and time-off policies as major highlights of their tenure.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: While some staff value senior leadership visibility, many report difficulty in achieving meaningful career advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Work-life balance is widely recognized as a positive feature, though it is not consistently experienced across all business units.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees report a friendly, inclusive, and collaborative environment that fosters effective cross-functional teamwork.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: While some appreciate the integrity and accountability, others report significant issues with favoritism and a lack of diversity.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic leadership and environments of fear indicate a serious challenge to employee well-being and psychological safety.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees express frustration over lack of promotions, micromanagement, and being overlooked for growth opportunities.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report feeling isolated or disconnected from the broader company mission, occasionally citing unfriendly team dynamics.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Certain departments, particularly in supply chain, face significant challenges with inflexible schedules and poor work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: High workloads and burnout are reported by some employees, who feel their compensation does not adequately reflect their responsibilities.
